utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: This is what I have got going for the party so far , liquor wise . Get a lot of liquor .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Okay , now uh , in terms of the invite list , I have got you , me , and Chandler and I am gonna invite Gunther cause , well , we have been talking about this pretty loud .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Listen , I know this is your party , but I would really like to the number of museum geeks that are gonna be there .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Yeah . tell you what , let not invite any of the anthropologists , only the dinosaur dudes !

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Okay ! We will need a six ... pack of Zima .

utterances.text: Hey guys , what are you doing ?
